summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as a mixed open-PR shard, not a dedupe cluster. All listed candidates are open PRs with useful, distinct fix scope or maintainer-owned draft state, so no close, merge, label, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with a distinct linked bug and maintainer-review state; preserve it as related work rather than closing or treating it as canonical for unrelated inventory items.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a focused plugin metadata guard; no duplicate/superseded evidence or close-safe condition exists.
Related to the model-id normalization guard family, but not close-safe because the overlapping linked PR is also draft/dirty and maintainer technical judgment is still pending.
Related provider-discovery metadata hardening work with a focused draft PR; no safe close or supersede path is proven in the hydrated artifact.
Related to provider policy surface work, but distinct from the merged CLI-backends fix and still in maintainer-owned draft review.
